use_cases: Product landing pages with expandable FAQ sections for customer questions
Help center interfaces displaying support documentation in accordion format
Onboarding documentation with collapsible answers and guidance
Knowledge base pages organizing information by categories with expand/collapse
SaaS pricing or feature pages addressing common concerns interactively
ai_summary: A monochrome FAQ accordion component featuring a dark theme with glass-morphism styling and subtle aurora effects. Features expandable question-answer pairs with smooth toggle animations and clean typography. The minimalist design uses neutral color palettes with semi-transparent panels and gradient overlays, making it ideal for modern SaaS landing pages, help centers, and documentation interfaces.
